message:
style(tui): fix clippy lints in e2e_artifact.rs

- Replace cast_possible_truncation: use try_from for u128→u64 and
  usize→u32 conversions with safe fallbacks
- Elide explicit lifetime: impl<'a> CaseBuilder<'a> → impl CaseBuilder<'_>
- Allow return_self_not_must_use on builder impl blocks (consistent
  with project-wide must_use_candidate = "allow")
- Fix needless_collect: use iterator methods directly instead of
  collecting into intermediate Vec
- Fix case_sensitive_file_extension_comparisons in test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
